data.name: About.Changelog.Item1
data.value: • Home screen with logo and quick actions

data.name: About.Changelog.Item2
data.value: • Performance test with 8 categories: CPU, RAM, GPU, Disk, Processes, Startup, Temperature, Network

data.name: About.Changelog.Item4
data.value: • Modules grouped by plan (Free / Advanced / Pro) in 3 columns

data.name: About.Changelog.Item5
data.value: • Safe/Risk chip with impact explanation on each module

data.name: About.Changelog.Item6
data.value: • Real-time monitoring and Cancel button during execution

data.name: About.Changelog.Item8
data.value: • CYBERNETIC theme with cyan + violet palette and exclusive logo

data.name: About.Changelog.Item9
data.value: • Sidebar with icons, separators and language selector (30 languages)

data.name: About.Footer
data.value: © 2026 DexSuite · Windows only · Requires administrator privileges

data.name: About.Project.Line1
data.value: DexSuite is an extreme optimization system for Windows.

data.name: About.Project.Line2
data.value: It analyzes your PC, applies high-impact tweaks and pushes performance to the physical limit.

data.name: About.Project.Line3
data.value: Each version adds new native C# modules focused on maxing FPS and slashing latency.

data.name: About.Social.Subtitle
data.value: Pysy ajan tasalla ja ota yhteyttä

data.name: BugReport.Body.DescribePrompt
data.value: Please describe what happened, what you expected, and the steps to reproduce:

data.name: BugReport.Error.Message
data.value: Send your report manually to suitedex@gmail.com. Error: {0}

data.name: BugReport.Subtitle
data.value: Opens your email client with diagnostic info pre-filled.

data.name: Gaming.CardDesc
data.value: Pick a game and apply a tailored tweak focused on max FPS and minimum input lag.

data.name: Gaming.FooterNote
data.value: Jokainen profiili soveltaa tarkkoja säätöjä maksimaalista FPS:ää ja minimaalista viivettä varten.

data.name: Gaming.Revert.ConfirmMessage
data.value: Tämä nollaa {0}:n sovelletun tilan. Huomautus: komentosarjan tekemiä järjestelmäsäätöjä ei voi peruuttaa automaattisesti – käytä Windowsin palautuspistettä kumota ne kokonaan.

data.name: Gaming.SelectorSubtitle
data.value: Tailored tweaks for peak FPS and minimum input lag. Each game has its own profile.

data.name: Home.Card.Analyze.Desc
data.value: Measure your computer's current state. Get a score out of 100.

data.name: Home.Card.Log.Desc
data.value: See live output during execution. Review the last run.

data.name: Home.Card.Optimize.Desc
data.value: Pick the modules you want. Launch cleanup and tweaks.

data.name: Home.Card.QuickClean.Desc
data.value: Empty temp folders and Recycle Bin.

data.name: Home.Card.WingetUpgrade.Desc
data.value: Update all installed apps at once.

data.name: Home.NotYetAnalyzed.Message
data.value: Click Analyze to get a score. Later, optimize and analyze again to see the difference.

data.name: Home.NotYetAnalyzed.Title
data.value: You haven't analyzed your computer yet

data.name: License.Activation.Help
data.value: Liitä ostoksesi yhteydessä saamasi aktivointiavain. Avain on lukittu tähän laitteistoon (HWID yllä).

data.name: License.Hwid.Label
data.value: Hardware ID (HWID) – lähetä tämä kehittäjälle avaimesi vastaanottamiseksi

data.name: License.Section.Description
data.value: DexSuite käyttää laitteistoon sidottua lisenssiä. HWID tunnistaa tämän tietokoneen; saamasi avain on allekirjoitettu ja toimii vain täällä.

data.name: Log.Empty.Subtitle
data.value: Actions you run will appear here automatically.

data.name: Log.Event.BugReportOpened
data.value: Bug report email opened in client.

data.name: Log.Event.QuickCleanFinished
data.value: Quick clean: {0} MB freed, {1} files removed.

data.name: Log.Event.RevertAllDone
data.value: Bulk revert finished — {0} reverted, {1} failed out of {2}.

data.name: Log.Event.SecurityFinishedWarn
data.value: Security check finished with non-zero exit: {0} (exit {1})

data.name: Log.Subtitle
data.value: Live output of the current process. Updates in real time while running.

data.name: Modules.Extra.Subtitle
data.value: Specific optimizations to push gaming performance to the absolute limit.

data.name: Modules.M01.Description
data.value: Clears Prefetch, system and user Temp, thumbnails, IconCache and DirectX shaders. Everything regenerates on its own.

data.name: Modules.M01.SafetyReason
data.value: Only clears caches Windows regenerates automatically as you use the PC. Does not affect your data or programs.

data.name: Modules.M02.Description
data.value: Clears old Windows logs, SoftwareDistribution, Windows Update, CBS, DISM and the WER folder.

data.name: Modules.M02.SafetyReason
data.value: Only deletes diagnostic log files. Does not affect system operation or personal data.

data.name: Modules.M03.Description
data.value: Empties stubborn Temp folders, recent items history, the Recycle Bin and Windows.old if present.

data.name: Modules.M03.Name
data.value: Temp files, recent items and Recycle Bin

data.name: Modules.M03.SafetyReason
data.value: Empties the Recycle Bin and temporary files. If you sent something important to the bin, restore it first.

data.name: Modules.M04.Description
data.value: Crash dumps, print queue, WMI compaction and clearing of Event Viewer. Events are not recoverable.

data.name: Modules.M04.SafetyReason
data.value: Clears the Event Viewer: once system events are deleted, they cannot be recovered. Useful for privacy, but think it over.

data.name: Modules.M05.Description
data.value: Stops wuauserv and BITS, clears SoftwareDistribution\Download and Delivery Optimization, then restarts the services.

data.name: Modules.M05.SafetyReason
data.value: Only empties the Windows Update download cache. If an update had failed, this module fixes it.

data.name: Modules.M06.Description
data.value: Removes obsolete system components. Takes 5-20 min and is irreversible (you won't be able to uninstall prior updates).

data.name: Modules.M06.SafetyReason
data.value: After this cleanup you can no longer uninstall the Windows updates already applied. It's safe, but permanent.

data.name: Modules.M07.Description
data.value: Clears the cache of Edge, Chrome, Firefox, Brave, Opera and Vivaldi. Does not touch profiles or passwords.

data.name: Modules.M07.SafetyReason
data.value: Only empties browser caches. Does NOT touch passwords, bookmarks, history or session cookies.

data.name: Modules.M08.Description
data.value: Flushes DNS cache, registers the machine in DNS and forces a Group Policy refresh.

data.name: Modules.M08.SafetyReason
data.value: Only refreshes the DNS cache and Group Policy. Does not change persistent network configuration.

data.name: Modules.M09.Description
data.value: Resets the Microsoft Store cache, clears OneDrive logs and Teams cache.

data.name: Modules.M09.SafetyReason
data.value: Cleans Microsoft Store, OneDrive and Teams caches. Your synced files and conversations are preserved.

data.name: Modules.M10.Description
data.value: Checks protected system files and repairs the Windows image. Repair-only, not destructive.

data.name: Modules.M10.SafetyReason
data.value: Repairs damaged system files. It's slow (10-30 min) but does NOT modify user data.

data.name: Modules.M11.Description
data.value: Disables mouse acceleration, maxes out the keyboard, disables sticky keys and reads the monitors' max Hz.

data.name: Modules.M11.SafetyReason
data.value: Tweaks mouse and keyboard preferences in the registry. If you don't like the changes, revert from Windows Settings.

data.name: Modules.M12.Description
data.value: Runs 'winget upgrade --all'. May take a while depending on app count. No per-module undo.

data.name: Modules.M12.SafetyReason
data.value: Updates ALL your apps to the latest version. If a new version brings unwanted changes, you can't undo from here.

data.name: Modules.M13.Description
data.value: Disables Windows Copilot, Cortana, DiagTrack, Timeline, AdvertisingID and CEIP.

data.name: Modules.M13.SafetyReason
data.value: Tweaks the registry to disable Copilot, Cortana and telemetry. Reversible by re-enabling each option.

data.name: Modules.M14.Description
data.value: Blocks suggested apps, location, widgets, WPBT and disables less-useful services.

data.name: Modules.M14.SafetyReason
data.value: Tweaks privacy policies and disables several Windows services. Reversible, but affects features like Widgets or location.

data.name: Modules.M15.Description
data.value: Power Throttling off, MMCSS priority, hibernation off, HAGS on, BCD platform tick (reboot required).

data.name: Modules.M15.SafetyReason
data.value: Tweaks BCD, MMCSS, hibernation and HAGS. Reboot required. Strong but reversible changes.

data.name: Modules.M16.Description
data.value: Tunes NIC (RSS, offload, EEE off), TCP stack (Nagle off, MaxUserPort 65534) and Google/Cloudflare DNS.

data.name: Modules.M16.SafetyReason
data.value: Tweaks network adapter parameters and TCP stack. If you lose connection after this, run 'netsh int ip reset'.

data.name: Modules.M17.Description
data.value: MRT, Defender quick scan, SMBv1 off, AutoRun off, DEP AlwaysOn, LLMNR/NetBIOS off, RDP off, UAC level 2.

data.name: Modules.M17.SafetyReason
data.value: Hardens system security. Disables RDP: if you used it for remote access, re-enable it manually.

data.name: Modules.M18.Description
data.value: Ensures TRIM is on for NTFS/ReFS, runs TRIM on detected SSDs and reads SMART temperature and wear.

data.name: Modules.M18.SafetyReason
data.value: Only reads SMART status and runs TRIM (a standard SSD operation). Does not modify data.

data.name: Modules.M19.Description
data.value: pnputil scan, lists OEM drivers and runs Windows Update to look for new drivers.

data.name: Modules.M19.SafetyReason
data.value: Only searches for drivers. Does NOT install them automatically: you decide whether to update them from Windows Update.

data.name: Modules.M20.Description
data.value: Opens a curated selection of per-game tuning profiles. Pick your title and get a tailored optimization aimed at maximum FPS and minimum input lag.

data.name: Modules.M20.SafetyReason
data.value: Applies game-specific tweaks targeting peak FPS and reduced latency. Revert any change later from Windows settings if needed.

data.name: Modules.Recommended.Why
data.value: These optimizations have been selected because they are safe, reversible and produce a visible improvement on most systems. They are the best starting point before diving into advanced or pro settings.

data.name: Modules.Subtitle
data.value: Check the modules you want to run.

data.name: Modules.Subtitle.Line2
data.value: Hover the Safe/Risk chip to know why.

data.name: Notification.RunFinished.WithErrors
data.value: {0} modules attempted — some reported errors. Check the Log tab.

data.name: QuickClean.ConfirmMessage
data.value: This will empty the Recycle Bin and clear Windows temp folders. No personal files will be touched.

data.name: QuickClean.Tooltip
data.value: Deletes temporary files from %TEMP%, C:\Windows\Temp and C:\Windows\Prefetch. Also empties the Recycle Bin. No personal files are touched.

data.name: Restore.Empty.Message
data.value: Run optimization modules to start logging changes here. Each native action is tracked automatically for one-click revert.

data.name: Restore.Revert.ConfirmAll
data.value: This will revert {0} pending change(s). The operation cannot be undone in DexSuite.

data.name: Restore.Revert.ConfirmOne
data.value: This will revert the change applied by '{0}'. The original value will be restored.

data.name: Restore.Subtitle
data.value: Every change DexSuite applies natively is logged here. Revert individually or all at once.

data.name: RestorePoint.ConfirmMessage
data.value: Creating a restore point allows you to undo every change from Windows if anything goes wrong. It only takes a few seconds.

data.name: Security.CardDesc
data.value: Run Windows Defender, SFC, DISM or MRT.

data.name: Security.Confirm.DefenderQuick
data.value: Run a Windows Defender quick scan? It usually takes 5–10 minutes.

data.name: Security.Confirm.Dism
data.value: Run DISM /RestoreHealth? Repairs the Windows image using Windows Update. Requires internet and may take 10–20 minutes.

data.name: Security.Confirm.Mrt
data.value: Run the Malicious Software Removal Tool (MRT /Q)? Runs silently in the background.

data.name: Security.Confirm.Sfc
data.value: Run System File Checker (SFC /scannow)? It scans and repairs corrupted system files. Takes 10–20 minutes.

data.name: Security.NotAvailable.Message
data.value: {0} is not installed on this system.

data.name: Settings.JumpToLog.Desc
data.value: Auto-switches view to see the process output.

data.name: Settings.Language.Description
data.value: Change the application language. The interface updates instantly.

data.name: Settings.MinimizeToTray.Desc
data.value: Pienennettäessä sovellus piiloutuu ilmoitusalueelle sulkemisen sijaan.

data.name: Settings.NotifyOnFinish.Desc
data.value: Shows a Windows toast in the Action Center when the optimization finishes.

data.name: Settings.RestorePoint.AlwaysAsksMessage
data.value: Each time you start an optimization, DexSuite asks if you want to create a restore point first. You can answer Yes, No or Cancel.

data.name: Settings.RestorePoint.Desc
data.value: Create a restore point before running optimizations, so you can undo any change from Windows settings.

data.name: Settings.SelfCleanup.Desc
data.value: Removes temporary update folders left in AppData by the installer.

data.name: Settings.Tier.Description
data.value: Determines which modules you can run. Activate a license in the License section to unlock Advanced or Pro modules.

data.name: Settings.WarnNonReversible.Desc
data.value: Asks confirmation for modules marked as Risk (future).

data.name: Specs.Summary.Note
data.value: Data read from Windows. Use the Refresh button to update if hardware changes.

data.name: Status.AnalysisInitial
data.value: Initial analysis: {0}/100 ({1}). You can optimize now.

data.name: Status.DevMode
data.value: Development mode — updates are unavailable in this environment.

data.name: Status.ExecutionDone
data.value: Execution completed. Go to Home and analyze again to compare.

data.name: Status.NewVersion
data.value: New version available: v{0}! Click «Update now» to install it.

data.name: Status.QuickCleanDone
data.value: Clean complete: {0} MB freed, {1} files removed

data.name: Status.QuickCleaning
data.value: Cleaning temp files and recycle bin...

data.name: Status.Ready
data.value: Valmis. Valitse moduulit ja paina Suorita.

data.name: Status.ScoresReset
data.value: Scores reset. Click Analyze to start over.

data.name: Status.SelectModulesFirst
data.value: Select at least one module before running.

data.name: Status.UpdateDownloaded
data.value: Update downloaded. The application will restart automatically.

data.name: Suggestion.Body.DescribePrompt
data.value: Describe your suggestion or improvement here:

data.name: Terms.AcceptNote
data.value: Napsauttamalla "Hyväksyn ehdot" vahvistat, että olet lukenut ja hyväksynyt yllä olevat ehdot.

data.name: Terms.Intro
data.value: Lue ja hyväksy seuraavat ehdot ennen DexSuiten käyttöä.

data.name: Terms.Section1.Body
data.value: DexSuite on Windowsin järjestelmän optimointityökalu. Se vaatii järjestelmänvalvojan oikeudet rekisteriasetusten, järjestelmäpalvelujen ja ajoitettujen tehtävien muokkaamiseen. Nämä muutokset vaikuttavat järjestelmän toimintaan ja suorituskykyyn.

data.name: Terms.Section2.Body
data.value: DexSuiten käyttö on omalla vastuullasi. Tehdyt muutokset voivat muuttaa järjestelmän toimintaa. On suositeltavaa luoda palautuspiste ennen voimakkaiden moduulien suorittamista. DexSuite ei anna takuuta tietyille tuloksille eikä ole vastuussa mistään vahingoista tai tietojen katoamisesta.

data.name: Terms.Section3.Body
data.value: Pelimoduuli lataa ja suorittaa PowerShell-komentosarjat GitHubista. DexSuite varmistaa niiden SHA-256-eheyden ennen suorittamista. Olet vastuussa skriptien toiminnan tarkistamisesta ennen niiden käyttöönottoa.

data.name: Terms.Section4.Body
data.value: DexSuite ei kerää käyttötietoja tai lähetä tietoja ulkoisille palvelimille. Kaikki tiedot (historia, lisenssi, asetukset) tallennetaan paikallisesti laitteellesi.

data.name: Tuning.ComingSoon.Message
data.value: Tämä osio on saatavilla tulevassa päivityksessä.

data.name: Tuning.Subtitle
data.value: Järjestelmän parannukset ja tärkeiden sovellusten nopea asennus.

data.name: Updates.AutoUpdate.Desc
data.value: Downloads and installs new versions in the background. Only when DexSuite is idle.

data.name: Updates.Channel.Desc
data.value: Stable: tested, stable versions. Beta: new versions earlier, but may have bugs.

data.name: Updates.HowItWorks.Message
data.value: DexSuite checks our release server for new versions and installs them in-place. If you are running a development build, automatic updates stay disabled.

data.name: Updates.NewVersionReady
data.value: Version v{0} ready to download and install.

data.name: Updates.Subtitle
data.value: DexSuite updates automatically to the latest version. Keep it up-to-date to get every new optimization.

data.name: Winget.ConfirmMessage
data.value: This will run winget upgrade --all. It may take several minutes depending on the number of pending updates. The progress will be shown in the log.

data.name: Winget.NotAvailable
data.value: Windows Package Manager (winget) is not available on this system. Update your system or install the App Installer from the Microsoft Store.

data.name: License.Activation.Help2
data.value: Avain on lukittu tähän laitteeseen (HWID yllä).

data.name: License.Section.Description2
data.value: Saatamasi avain on allekirjoitettu ja toimii vain tällä laitteella.

data.name: Security.OptionsTooltip
data.value: Defender · Pikatarkistus: havaitsee aktiiviset haittaohjelmat järjestelmästä. SFC · Järjestelmätiedostojen tarkistus: etsii ja korjaa vahingoittuneet järjestelmätiedostot. DISM · Palauta kuva: korjaa Windows-kuvan, kun SFC ei voi. MRT · Haittaohjelmien poisto: Microsoftin virallinen työkalu tiettyjä uhkia vastaan.

data.name: Settings.Behavior.Desc
data.value: Hallitse, miten DexSuite toimii, kun suoritat moduuleja tai pienennät sovellusta.

data.name: Settings.RestorePoint.Desc2
data.value: Jos sinun on kumottava muutoksia, voit tehdä sen Windowsin asetuksista.

data.name: GamingDisclaimer.Body
data.value:
Pelin optimointi avaa konsolin, jossa sinun on luettava viestit, valittava vaihtoehdot ja syötettävä polku tai kaksi. Se ei ole vaikeaa, mutta kiinnitä huomiota siihen, mitä näytöllä näkyy.
Profiilit ladataan GitHubista ja toimivat järjestelmänvalvojan oikeuksin. Käytä omalla vastuullasi.
